General.Name: Travel Expert Asia Enterprises Ltd
General.Description: Travel Expert (Asia) Enterprises Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the travel and travel related businesses in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. The company provides services related to the sale of air tickets, hotel accommodation, and other travel related products and services. It is also involved in the package tours and investment in treasury activities. In addition, the company offers marketing, management, and lease management services; and provides IT support services. Further, it operates retail shops in Hong Kong under the Travel Expert and Premium Holidays brand names. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Wan Chai, Hong Kong. Travel Expert (Asia) Enterprises Limited is a subsidiary of Colvin & Horne Holdings Limited.
General.Address: Overseas Trust Bank Building, Wan Chai, Hong Kong
